chat_history.content: Muhammad, sorry to hear you're not feeling well. A fever can be a sign of infection or illness. Can you tell me a bit more about your fever? How high is it, and do you have any other symptoms like a headache, body aches, or fatigue?

Thanks for sharing that. I want to make sure I understand correctly and give you the best guidance.

Could you tell me a bit more about what you're experiencing? For example:
• What symptoms are you having?
• How long have they been present?
• Is there anything that makes it better or worse?

The more details you share, the better I can help!

Muhammad, I understand you're not feeling well, but it seems like we didn't quite connect earlier. Could you please share more about what's going on? You mentioned having a fever, but we didn't discuss any other symptoms or how long you've been experiencing this. Any additional details you can provide would be super helpful in giving you the best guidance.
